base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of quick_man_stage — a tile from 1988 mega man 2. Quick Man — instant-death laser corridors + vertical descent. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Quick Man — instant-death laser corridors + vertical descent
